content:
Desiderio is committed to making this website usable for everyone, including people who rely on assistive technology. We aim to meet WCAG 2.1 Level AA across every page and template.

What we have done

  • Every interactive element is reachable and operable with a keyboard.
  • Colour contrast meets or exceeds the 4.5:1 ratio for body text.
  • Images carry descriptive alternative text; decorative images are hidden from screen readers.
  • Pages use semantic landmarks and a logical heading order.

Known limitations

Some third-party embedded maps and a handful of older PDF documents do not yet meet our target. We are replacing them and expect full conformance by Q4 2026.
